login.title: Log In
login.unconfirmedPrefix: Please confirm your email before logging in.

forgotPassword.title: Forgot your password?
forgotPassword.subtitle: If you've forgotten your password, use the form below to request a link to change it.
forgotPassword.successMessage: If an account with that email exists, you'll receive reset instructions shortly.

resetPassword.invalidMessage: This password reset link is invalid or has expired. Please request a new one.
resetPassword.title: Reset your password
resetPassword.subtitle: Enter your new password below.
resetPassword.tokenMissing: Reset token is missing or invalid
resetPassword.passwordMinLength: Password must be at least 6 characters
resetPassword.successMessage: Password reset successfully! Redirecting to login...

resendConfirmation.title: Resend confirmation instructions
resendConfirmation.subtitle: Not received a confirmation email? Use the form below and we'll send you another.
resendConfirmation.emailInvalid: Please enter a valid email address
resendConfirmation.successMessage: If an account with that email exists, you'll receive confirmation instructions shortly.

checkInbox.heading: Check your inbox
checkInbox.sentTo: We've sent a confirmation email to
checkInbox.hintPrefix: Click the link in the email to activate your account. Didn't receive it?

emailConfirmed.heading: Email Confirmed!
emailConfirmed.message: Your email has been confirmed successfully. Redirecting to dashboard...

confirmEmail.pendingDescription: Please wait while we confirm your email address.
confirmEmail.errorMessage: This confirmation link is no longer valid. Request a new one to continue.

exercismCallback.pendingDescription: Please wait while we sign you in with Exercism.

twoFactorVerify.title: Two-Factor Authentication
twoFactorVerify.subtitle: Enter the 6-digit code from your authenticator app.

twoFactorSetup.instructionsHeading: Scan the QR code with your authenticator app to secure your account.
twoFactorSetup.appsHint: Use Google Authenticator, 1Password, Authy, or a similar app to scan the code above.
twoFactorSetup.codeLabel: Enter the 6-digit code from your app

unsubscribe.linkInvalid: This unsubscribe link is invalid or has expired.
unsubscribe.tooManyRequests: Too many requests. Please wait a moment and try again.
unsubscribe.serviceUnavailable: Service temporarily unavailable. Please try again later.
unsubscribe.unableToProcess: Unable to process your request. Please contact support if this continues.
unsubscribe.networkError: Network error. Please check your connection and try again.
unsubscribe.processingDescription: Please wait while we process your request.
unsubscribe.successDescription: You have been unsubscribed from our mailing list.

avatarEdit.changeSubtitlePart2: This will only be visible to you.
avatarEdit.uploadText: Click to upload a new photo

cancelConfirm.title: Cancel your subscription?
cancelConfirm.message: We'd hate to see you go! If you cancel, you'll lose access to Premium at the end of your current billing period.

cancelSuccess.title: Subscription cancelled
cancelSuccess.message: Your Premium subscription has been cancelled. You can continue enjoying all Premium features until your current billing period ends.
cancelSuccess.resubscribeNote: Changed your mind? You can resubscribe anytime.

changeEmail.title: Change Email Address
changeEmail.importantText: A confirmation email will be sent to your new email address. You'll need to confirm it before the change takes effect.
changeEmail.emailInvalid: Please enter a valid email address
changeEmail.emailSame: New email must be different from current email

changePassword.title: Change Password
changePassword.newHint: Must be at least 8 characters long
changePassword.minLength: Password must be at least 8 characters long
changePassword.mustDiffer: New password must be different from current password

deleteAccount.sendFailed: Failed to send confirmation email. Please try again.
deleteAccount.confirmMessage: Do you really want to delete your account? You will lose all your work. This is irreversible.
deleteAccount.securityMessage: We've sent you an email to confirm this is really you. Please click the button in that email to delete your account.

paymentHistory.title: Payment History
paymentHistory.subtitle: View and download receipts for your past payments.
paymentHistory.error: Unable to load payment history. Please try again later.

profile.nameTooLong: Name must be less than 100 characters
profile.handleInvalid: Handle can only contain letters, numbers, underscores, and hyphens
profile.handleTooShort: Handle must be at least 3 characters
profile.handleTooLong: Handle must be less than 30 characters
profile.emailInvalid: Please enter a valid email address
profile.confirmationPendingHint: Please check your email to confirm the change.
profile.emailNotConfirmed: Your email address is not confirmed.

subscriptionSection.loadingCardDescription: Manage your subscription plan and billing details

benefits.activeSubtitle: Here's what you're unlocking every day
benefits.footerPrefix: Got a question? Learn more about
benefits.cancellingSubtitle: Here's what you'll miss when your access ends
benefits.resubscribeSuffix: and continue your coding journey with Jiki's support.
benefits.unlimitedAiDescription: Get personalised guidance from Jiki whenever you're stuck
benefits.unlimitedContentDescription: Access all exercises, projects, and learning paths
benefits.certificatesDescription: Earn shareable certificates when you complete courses
benefits.prioritySupportDescription: Get faster responses when you need help
benefits.earlyAccessDescription: Be the first to try new features and content

cancelSectionPanel.title: Cancel Subscription
cancelSectionPanel.description: If you cancel, you'll lose access to Premium features at the end of your billing period. You can always resubscribe later.

premiumUpsell.subtitle: You're currently on the Free plan. Upgrade to Premium to unlock:
premiumUpsell.unlimitedAiDescription: Get personalised guidance from Jiki whenever you're stuck
premiumUpsell.unlimitedContentDescription: Access all exercises, projects, and learning paths
premiumUpsell.certificatesDescription: Earn shareable certificates when you complete courses

neverSubscribed.heading: Upgrade Your Plan
neverSubscribed.subtitle: Unlock advanced features and enhanced learning experiences with our premium plans.

errorBoundary.title: Subscription System Error
errorBoundary.messagePart1: We're experiencing issues loading your subscription information. This might be a temporary problem with our payment system.
errorBoundary.messagePart2: Please try refreshing the page, or contact support if the issue persists.

danger.sessionDescription: Manage your active sessions across all devices.
danger.deleteDescription: Permanently delete your account and all associated data. This action cannot be undone.

notifications.essentialDescription: Important updates about your account, security, and service changes.
notifications.featuresTitle: Emails about new features or content
notifications.featuresDescription: Stay updated with the latest features and content added to Jiki.
notifications.livestreamsDescription: Get notified about upcoming livestreams and events.
notifications.milestonesTitle: Emails when you reach new milestones
notifications.milestonesDescription: Celebrate your achievements and progress on Jiki.
notifications.activityTitle: Other emails in response to things that you do on Jiki
notifications.activityDescription: Activity-based notifications like unlocking badges and completing challenges.

subscription.loginRequired: Please log in to upgrade your account
subscription.checkoutFailed: Failed to start checkout process. Please try again.

auth.sessionExpired: Your session has expired. Please sign in again.

welcomeToPremium.description: Thanks for upgrading! You now have access to all Premium benefits, including unlimited chats with Jiki, Projects, and Build with Jeremy!

chatGate.title: Welcome to AI Chat!
chatGate.description: Your AI assistant is now unlocked and ready to help with your coding exercises.

featureGate.title: Feature Unlocked!
featureGate.description: You now have access to premium features that will enhance your learning experience.

settings.title: Welcome to {tier}!
settings.description: Your subscription has been activated. Explore your new features in the settings.

general.title: Welcome to {tier}!
general.description: Thank you for upgrading your plan. You now have access to all premium features.

subscriptionSuccess.renewalNotice: Your subscription will renew automatically on {date}. Manage your subscription in Settings.

confirmation.defaultMessage: Are you sure you want to proceed?

connectionError.title: Whoops! Lost connection
connectionError.subtitle: Jiki got a little tangled up and dropped the connection. Don't worry though - we're working on getting things plugged back in!
connectionError.helpTextPrefix: Just sit tight - this usually fixes itself in a few moments.

sessionExpired.title: Session Expired
sessionExpired.description: Your session has expired. Please log in again.

paymentVerificationFailed.title: We couldn't confirm your payment
paymentVerificationFailed.description: Something went wrong while checking with Stripe. Try refreshing the page in a moment — if Premium still isn't active, contact support.

levelMilestone.title: 🎉 Level Complete!
levelMilestone.message: Congratulations! You've successfully completed {levelTitle} and mastered all its concepts.
levelMilestone.readyNext: You're now ready to unlock the next level and continue your learning journey!

authError.title: You've been Logged out.
authError.subtitle: For some reason you've been logged out (maybe a security check, maybe you logged out on a different device?). Please reload the page to continue.

rateLimit.title: You've moved too fast.
rateLimit.subtitle: You've sent too many requests to our servers and so we're putting you on pause for a few seconds. Please wait and you'll be automatically reconnected.
rateLimit.noteText: Opening new tabs or making additional requests will extend your wait time.

exerciseSuccess.defaultMessage: All tests passed! You've successfully completed this exercise.

welcome.title: Welcome to Jiki!
welcome.subtitle: Watch this short video to get started.
welcome.skipMessage: This video helps you get the most out of Jiki. Are you sure you want to skip it?

chatGate.headline: Unlock AI Chat Assistant
chatGate.description: Get instant help with your coding exercises from our AI assistant.

featureGate.headline: Unlock {feature}
featureGate.description: Upgrade your plan to access advanced features and enhanced learning experiences.

settings.headline: Choose Your Plan
settings.description: Select the subscription plan that best fits your learning needs.

general.headline: Upgrade Your Plan
general.description: Choose the plan that fits your learning goals and unlock advanced features.

subscription.renewNotice: Your subscription will renew automatically each month. You can cancel anytime from your settings.

walkthroughConfirm.title: Try solving it yourself first?
walkthroughConfirm.intro: Before watching the Deep Dive, you might want use these resources to help you pass the tests yourself:
walkthroughConfirm.conceptPagesText: — review the concepts used in this exercise
walkthroughConfirm.askJikiText: — get personalised help from Jiki without spoilers
walkthroughConfirm.whatHappenedText: — step through your code line by line to see what went wrong
walkthroughConfirm.revealHintsText: — read through all the hints above for guidance

paymentConfirming.title: Confirming your payment…
paymentConfirming.description: Hang tight while we confirm your payment with Stripe. This usually only takes a moment.

paymentProcessing.title: Payment Processing
paymentProcessing.description: Thank you. We're waiting for your payment provider to send us the funds. Once they do we'll upgrade your plan to Premium and send you an email.

success.title: All tests passed!
success.messageExercise: Great work! You're ready to complete this exercise and move on to the next challenge.
success.messageProject: Great work! You're ready to complete this project and move on to the next challenge.

conceptUnlocked.title: Concept unlocked!
conceptUnlocked.messageGeneric: You've unlocked a new concept to explore.

completed.messageExercise: Great work completing {title}! Ready to continue to the next exercise?
completed.messageProject: Great work completing {title}! Ready to continue to the next project?

difficultyRating.title: Rate your experience
difficultyRating.message: Help us improve {title} by rating it.

projectUnlocked.title: Project unlocked!
projectUnlocked.message: All that practice means you're ready to combine what you've learned in a new project.
projectUnlocked.premiumInfoSuffix: to access all the Projects as you unlock them.

basic.subheading: Upgrade to Premium to accelerate your road to job-ready.
basic.note: + Access to public YouTube videos and community forums for additional learning resources.

subscriptionCheckout.unexpectedError: An unexpected error occurred. Please try again.
